title: Trump rejects Iran response — 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE,' 'I don't like it' via Truth Social
snippet: US President Donald Trump rejected Iran's counterproposal via Truth Social: 'I have just read the response from Iran's so-called Representatives. I don't like it — TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE!' Trump accused Iran of 'playing games.' The rejection came within hours of Iran's response being delivered via Pakistan mediators.
tag_reason: 트럼프의 이란 응답 즉각 거부는 5/10 신규 사건. 이전 소스에 동일/유사 항목 없음.

entities.name: Iran formal response to US MoU via Pakistan
